#  Scan a Submittal QR Code (iOS) 
##  Background 
A Quality Response (QR) code is a two-dimensional bar code that you can associate with a submittal item in Procore. Generating a QR code and then printing it out to place on location at a construction site makes it easier for responsible team members to link submittal information that might be stored in Procore. This article explains how to scan the QR code.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:** 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Submittals tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * _**Important!**_ A QR code scanner app will not recognize these QR codes. You must scan the QR code with one of Procore's mobile apps.
    * This action can be performed offline. Tasks performed offline sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Tap the **QR** code icon.
![Submittals Ios Scan Submittal Qr Code](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e4fea4a684641f411eeffb4bac84a2ab/51d991738f350e6ec22e5eff031316ff/submittals-ios-scan-submittal-qr-code.png?fm=webp)
  3. Allow Procore to access your camera.
  4. Point your camera toward the QR code, and it will scan and pull up the submittal on your mobile device.


## See Also
  * [Search for and Filter Submittals (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-submittals-ios)
  * [Submittals (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/permissions)
  * [View a Submittal (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/view-a-submittal-ios)
title: Scan a Submittal QR Code (iOS)
description: How to scan a QR code for a submittal using the Submittals tool on a mobile device.
